name: LRU Cache
description: Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache. Implement get(key) and put(key, value). Both must run in O(1) time. When the cache reaches capacity, evict the least recently used key before inserting a new one.
constraints: 1 <= capacity <= 3000. 0 <= key <= 10^4. 0 <= value <= 10^5. At most 2 * 10^5 calls to get and put.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long hot-cache access traces that punish list or array recency updates without direct node relocation
